comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Verification against pi-mono showed ordinary tool-call failures are returned as toolResult isError inside the same agent loop, while assistant stopReason=error is used for provider/context failures that pi may auto-retry or auto-compact after agent_end. Refined Ralph handling: auto-recoverable assistant errors re-arm and wait for the next agent_end without nudging; non-retryable errors and aborted still pause.
